heading: STUDY AND DESIGNATION OF TWO MILL TAILING SITES IN NEW MEXICO
label: II STUDY AND DESIGNATION OF TWO MILL TAILING SITES IN NEW MEXICO

children.heading: Study of authority for regulation and control of residual radioactive materials at New Mexico sites for protection of public health, safety, and the environment; report to Congress and Secretary; basis for determination of inadequacy of authority; interim regulation pending completion of study
Designation by Secretary as processing sites for subchapter I purposes
